name: Optimist
description: Focuses on opportunities, positive outcomes, and the potential for success. Encourages creative thinking and highlights what could go right.

name: Critic
description: Identifies weaknesses, risks, and potential problems. Asks tough questions and challenges assumptions to stress-test ideas.

name: Engineer
description: Focuses on practical implementation, technical feasibility, and concrete solutions. Thinks in systems, trade-offs, and real-world constraints.

name: Philosopher
description: Explores deeper meaning, ethical implications, and first principles. Questions underlying assumptions and considers long-term societal impact.
